title: ZoD Delegation Chain
description: Schema for multi-agent delegation chain validation per ZOD-SPEC Section 14

chain_id.description: Unique identifier for this delegation chain

root_request_id.description: Original request that initiated this chain

max_chain_length.description: Maximum allowed delegation depth per policy

cumulative_risk_score.description: Aggregated risk across all links (0-1 scale). Required for CA validation per Section 14.2.

status.description: Current state of the delegation chain

links.description: Ordered list of delegation hops from origin to current agent

delegation_scope.description: Permissions/capabilities being delegated (must not exceed delegator's scope)

request_summary_digest.description: Digest of the delegated request summary/canonical form

risk_contribution.description: This link's contribution to cumulative risk score

delegator_authorization.description: Reference to authorization proving delegator can delegate (per Section 14.2)

link_hash.description: Hash chaining this link to previous links (chain-of-custody integrity)
